return(function(x,Y,b,R,c,z,j,k,m,g,v,V,y,F,J,A,d,s,f,E,n,u,N)E,m,y,A,J,k,d,V,n,g,v,f,s,F,u,N=function(x,D)local Y=J(D)local b=function(b,R)return y(x,{b;R},D,Y)end return b end,function(x,D)local Y=J(D)local b=function(b,R,c)return y(x,{b,R;c},D,Y)end return b end,function(y,b,R,c)local go,P,G,Qo,Go,g,L,v,vo,jo,Q,Jo,io,a,uo,X,Vo,Ro,No,r,Yo,N,S,W,Uo,B,Eo,U,K,To,Zo,bo,j,ko,eo,Co,M,Xo,Wo,Z,e,p,w,d,t,ho,zo,Ao,xo,Do,Fo,l,O,o,h,mo,q,J,T,H,C,i,ao,oo,I,no,so,yo,co,Io,fo while y do if y<-786296+8223410 then if y<290636+3377477 then if y<2619998-781918 then if y<478614+439165 then if y<-83759-(-440919)then if y<-950146+1127524 then if y<507833+-376856 then if y<988611+-959109 then D=715348+-715347,#x,104810-104809 do N[x[D]]=N[x[D]]+(585725-585724)end if b then local y=b(true)local Y=c(y)Y[D(921092+-889662)],Y[D(1059228-1027447)],Y[D(-239139-(-270951))]=x,v,function()return
